title: Inbox Engine
tagline: One domain sending 5,000 cold emails/day gets burned. A hundred domains sending 50 each don't.

title: Lead Agent
tagline: A whiteboard tree of agents that finds leads, emails them, and books the Zoom call before you wake up.

title: LeadKit
tagline: The $100/mo outreach SaaS, except it's ~240 Node agents on your own machine and mostly runs on $0.

title: Creator Hunt
tagline: Finds 10k-follower founders on four platforms and offers them $50 to post. Refuses to send without a mailing address.

title: Cold 1M Machine
tagline: Planned a million cold emails, fact-checked itself, and concluded: don't send a million cold emails.

title: Website Scaler
tagline: Ten agents find businesses with no website, build them one, and email a $50 invoice-shaped offer.

title: Cold Email Deliverability Playbook
tagline: Everything learned sending cold at scale, written down so the next domain doesn't die finding out.
